title: [verify-error-message-clarity] Aggregate failure: verify error message clarity (15/15 scenario checks failed) on n/a — aggregate finding across endpoints — expected All 15 'verify error message clarity' scenario checks pass against the documented behaviour, observed [api-tester-verify-error-message-clarity] quality outcome=FAIL; metric=0.0 (undocumented)
expected: All 15 'verify error message clarity' scenario checks pass against the documented behaviour

testing_steps: 1. Start the target API at http://localhost:8899.
2. Write a script that sends known-bad requests to http://localhost:8899: GET /products/999999, POST /products/add with an empty JSON object, and a syntactically malformed body.
3. Assert each error response uses the documented status and a non-empty message that names the offending field/resource.
4. Compare your script's failures with the per-scenario evidence in TestCases/verify-error-message-clarity/cases.json — this run recorded 15 of 15 checks failing.
